inputs.srepr: MutableDenseMatrix([[Mul(Symbol('a', positive=True, real=True), cos(Mul(Symbol('Omega', positive=True, real=True), Symbol('t', positive=True, real=True))))], [Mul(Symbol('a', positive=True, real=True), sin(Mul(Symbol('Omega', positive=True, real=True), Symbol('t', positive=True, real=True))))], [Integer(0)]])

MutableDenseMatrix([[Mul(Integer(-1), Symbol('a', positive=True, real=True), cos(Mul(Symbol('Omega', positive=True, real=True), Symbol('t', positive=True, real=True))))], [Mul(Integer(-1), Symbol('a', positive=True, real=True), sin(Mul(Symbol('Omega', positive=True, real=True), Symbol('t', positive=True, real=True))))], [Integer(0)]])

method: equal-mass circular binary m*x1 + m*x2 with x2=-x1
